{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,

  "confidence": 0.9,

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Group lockbox misused — individual padlocks not properly applied to lockbox or lockbox not securing machine energy isolation devices as required",
    "LOTO procedural non-compliance: group lockout not following OSHA 1910.147 group lockout requirements",
    "Energy isolation not verified through proper group lockbox protocol, creating risk of unexpected energization"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work and re-apply group lockbox per OSHA 1910.147(f)(3) group lockout procedure",
    "Verify each authorized employee has applied their individual lockout device to the group lockbox or has comparable protection",
    "Confirm all energy isolating devices are secured and energy is verified zero before any work proceeds",
    "Retrain affected employees on group lockout/tagout procedures"
  ],
  "rationale": "A misused group lockbox means the LOTO system is not providing the required multi-employee protection under OSHA 1910.147. Group lockout requires each authorized employee to have their individual lock on the lockbox or comparable means of protection. Misuse of the lockbox defeats the energy isolation and creates a high risk of unexpected machine energization during servicing.",
  "references": ["OSHA 1910.147(c)", "OSHA 1910.147(f)(3)", "OSHA 1910.147(b) definitions"]
}
